features: Star Wars night light: This night light set contains 3 realistic acrylic patterns in Star Wars style. You can choose different patterns and different light colours depending on your mood or environment.

Multiple modes and easy to use: simply controlled by a 24-button remote control or a smart touch button in 16 static single colour modes and 4 dynamic flash colour modes and brightness adjusted. You can either stay on one colour or rotate through all.

Child safety: 3D lights could be connected via USB or powered by 3 AA batteries (not included). The high-quality LED light is soft, does not flicker, does not harm children's eyes and adds a charming atmosphere to your home.

Timer and energy saving: The night light has a timer function, can be ly set from 15 minutes to 12 hours, is more energy saving and healthier for your children. Various options for colours, you can either stay on one colour or rotate by all of them.

PERFECT STARS WARS GIFTS FOR CHILDREN: The Star Wars lamp is a great gift for kids, boys, girls, men and Star Wars fans on birthday, shower day, Christmas day, New Year, Valentine's Day. You will see a happy smile from children. This 3D night light can also be a beautiful desk lamp for children's room, living room, bedroom, bar, office etc.
description: Product information: Star Wars night light, perfect night light for children, especially for Star Wars lovers. who become a child's friend and serve as a helping hand for children who struggle to sleep, are afraid of the dark or like to go to the toilet for midnight. Special features: 1.16 colour changing / dimmable / 4 colour flashing modes (flash, strobe, fade, smooth). 2. The remote control is easy to use and your baby can change the colours from the bed. 3. Two ways of power supply: 3 x AA batteries (not included) or USB port (recommended). The battery option is ideal for on the go or without electricity. You will receive: 3 x creative acrylic board. 1 x white base (3.5 x 3.5 x 1.5 inches). 1 x remote control. 1 x English manual. 1 x black micro USB cable.
